ast.name: desc
ast.source: Disable the plugin's default styles. You will need to provide your own CSS snippets to customize the appearance of whitespace.
ast.target: 禁用插件的默认样式。您需要提供自己的 CSS 代码片段来自定义空白字符的外观。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Always display the leading '>' for blockquotes in Live Preview mode.
ast.target: 在实时预览模式下始终显示块引用的前导 '>'。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add a visual style to the space reserved by list markers (e.g., '-', '1.').
ast.target: 为列表标记（例如 '-', '1.'）保留的空间添加视觉样式。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: By default, this plugin will show leading and trailing whitespace including marks for line endings, hard breaks, and tabs.
ast.target: 默认情况下，此插件将显示前导和尾随空白，包括行尾、硬换行和制表符的标记。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display markers for all whitespace characters, including those between words.
ast.target: 显示所有空白字符的标记，包括单词之间的空白。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display markers only for multiple consecutive whitespace characters between words (included in 'Show All Whitespace').
ast.target: 仅显示单词之间多个连续空白字符的标记（包含在“显示所有空白”中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display markers for line endings (different from hard line breaks).
ast.target: 显示行尾的标记（与硬换行不同）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The following settings allow you to enable or disable the display of whitespace characters within the document. Unless otherwise noted, the appearance of whitespace follows the settings above.
ast.target: 以下设置允许您启用或禁用文档中空白字符的显示。除非另有说明，空白字符的外观遵循上述设置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display whitespace characters in YAML frontmatter (properties).
ast.target: 在 YAML 前置内容（属性）中显示空白字符。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display leading or trailing whitespace characters in tables.
ast.target: 显示表格中的前导或尾随空白字符。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display leading/trailing whitespace characters in code blocks (included in 'Show All Code Block Whitespace')
ast.target: 显示代码块中的前导/尾随空白字符（包含在“显示所有代码块空白”中）
